3592.name: The Boar Track
3592.description: Hundreds of hoof prints indicate the presence of a group of boars. The bark of the trees have bristle hairs stuck onto them. Half eaten roots lie about in profusion.

3593.name: The Boar Track
3593.description: The ground is uneven and rutted. Offal covers the way, and a strong odor emanates from the soil. A few mushrooms lie half consumed by a nearby tree trunk.

3594.name: The Boar Track
3594.description: Hoof prints and piles of porcine patties are here in profusion. The smell of urine permeates the air. Small snuffling noises echo through the air.

3595.name: Lupine Corner
3595.description: The markings of a wolf clan along the base of the trees, and the tell tale scent of male wolf musk, make this turn in the path a sign to all travelers to beware.

3596.name: Wolf Hollow
3596.description: A small hollow, lined with trees, shows the markings of a wolf clan. Trees that have spray stains and torn up moss indicate the possibility of wolves in this part of the forest.

3597.name: Wolf Hollow
3597.description: The path runs through the bottom of a small hollow that has all the indications of wolves. Spoor and spray are scattered throughout the fringes of the trail.

3598.name: Wolf Hollow
3598.description: Numerous wolf tracks run along the side of the path. A series of skeletal remains are faintly visible in the underbrush at the base of the trees.

3599.name: Boar Bend
3599.description: Huge ruts in the ground and prints show that a group of wild pigs have been here recently. Most of the vegetation is missing from around the base of the surrounding trees.

2464.name: Forest Path
2464.description: Trees and more trees. The forest is impenetrable except along the narrow path that leads north and south. Acorns from the surrounding trees lay strewn across the overgrown footpath. You are riding atop a well-bred horse. A firefly goes south.

2465.name: Forest Path
2465.description: Thick growth along the path makes all movement off it impossible. A few great limbs hang over the path and seem to cradle the sky. You are riding atop a well-bred horse.

2466.name: Forest Path
2466.description: Acorns are spread along the path and show evidence of animal movement. A few pieces of barren ground poke out through the carpet of leaves and stare up to the sky. You are riding atop a well-bred horse.

2467.name: Forest Path
2467.description: Here along the path through Jharet, a great root reaches its fingers up into the air, its gnarled surface eerily alive, then arches and dives back into the fertile forest soil. *A graceful willow tree stands here, its trailing branches swaying gently.* You are riding atop a well-bred horse.

2472.name: Forest Path
2472.description: Here along the path through Jharet, a great root reaches its fingers up into the air, its gnarled surface eerily alive, then arches and dives back into the fertile forest soil. You are riding atop a well-bred horse.

2473.name: Forest Path
2473.description: The dark, green cool settles down from the branches overhead. A multitude of interlaced branches make an impenetrable wall along the edges of the path, which splits here to venture east, south, and westward through the ancient forest of Jharet. *A graceful willow tree stands here, its trailing branches swaying gently.* You are riding atop a well-bred horse.

1323.name: In The Forest
1323.description: Tall trees loom over your head as the canopy of the forest attempts to climb to the sun. Small birds and playful squirrels cavort through the upper parts of these imperious trees. You are riding atop a well-bred horse.

1324.name: In The Forest
1324.description: A blending of oak and pine make this bit of forest a vibrant green with a myriad of tree shapes and sizes. Birds chirp merrily amongst the sheltering branches. A graceful willow tree stands here, its trailing branches swaying gently.

1325.name: In The Forest
1325.description: Oak and pine trees blend together in harmonious union with their branches combining to make a ceiling of green. A multitude of forest dwelling animals crowd among the leaves. You are riding atop a well-bred horse.

npcs.name: Brigand
npcs.description: He looks pretty scraggly with his patched jerkin and week-old beard.

1326.name: The Split Path
1326.description: The trees seem to part here and a small path, that seems more like an animals track, heads off both north and south. There is abundant animal life all about the edges of this small trail, but the way east is blocked by dense, seemingly impassable growth. A graceful willow tree stands here, its trailing branches swaying gently.

1327.name: Leafy Path
1327.description: Small trees fight for growth underneath the green canopy above. A few branches lie strewn about, and the moss and lichens are making a slow lunch of a fallen tree on the side of the way. You are riding atop a well-bred horse.

1328.name: The Sharp Turn
1328.description: A sudden turn in the path makes travel difficult here. To the north, the path seems to be traversable, but to the east, the way seems less clear. A large tree bars your way south and west. You are riding atop a well-bred horse.

npcs.name: Brigand
npcs.description: He looks pretty scraggly with his patched jerkin and week-old beard.

npcs.name: Tree sprite
npcs.description: Small and quick, she seems to blend into the folliage around her.  She has a mirthful grin that probably means you no good.

1329.name: Forest Path
1329.description: Dark conifers line the edges of the path and needles make the ground a soft bed of decaying vegetation. Fungus and lichens cover the base of the trees and provide a varied surface on which countless insects make their abodes. You are riding atop a well-bred horse.

npcs.name: Brigand
npcs.description: He looks pretty scraggly with his patched jerkin and week-old beard.

npcs.name: Panath
npcs.description: Hugely muscled, and clad in naught but breeches, Panath - Slayer of Wild Beasts - and self proclaimed master huntsman, stalks the forest in search of his next prey.  Who knows, it could be you.

1330.name: Forest Path
1330.description: The darkness to the south and east indicate an impenetrable mass of trees. To the north and west, however, the path continues under the outspread limbs of the knotted pines. *A graceful willow tree stands here, its trailing branches swaying gently.* You are riding atop a well-bred horse.

npcs.name: Tree sprite
npcs.description: Small and quick, she seems to blend into the folliage around her.  She has a mirthful grin that probably means you no good.

1331.name: Forest Path
1331.description: The dark, green cool settles down from the branches overhead. A multitude of interlaced branches make an impenetrable wall along the edges of the path, which splits here to venture east, south, and westward through the ancient forest of Jharet. A graceful willow tree stands here, its trailing branches swaying gently.

npcs.name: Firefly
npcs.description: It's a happy little bug.

1332.name: Forest Path
1332.description: Large trees loom above and create a ceiling of green. The forbidding, dense foliage seems impenetrable and it imparts an ethereal sense of stillness to Jharet. Worn footpaths meander through the ancient woods, which seem to go on endlessly.

npcs.name: Firefly
npcs.description: It's a happy little bug.

npcs.name: Tree sprite
npcs.description: Small and quick, she seems to blend into the folliage around her.  She has a mirthful grin that probably means you no good.

1333.name: Forest Path
1333.description: The smell of growth and decay permeate the air with a scent as deep as the forest itself. Branches creak and groan as the wind shifts them slowly against each other. The path leads north and east with a small clearing to the south.

1334.name: Forest Path
1334.description: The forest almost seems alive as the trees combine together in an almost imperceptible sway. Occasional birds burst forth into the air and flutter from one tree to another. A graceful willow tree stands here, its trailing branches swaying gently.

1335.name: Small Clearing
1335.description: A mouldering skeleton lies pinned to a tree with an arrow through its ribcage. Tatters of cloth wave slowly in the breeze, and the sound of locusts fills the air with a rich hum. A butterfly alights on the skull, completing the mood of peaceful serenity here.

npcs.name: Dappled unicorn
npcs.description: fearless eyes and calmly noses around the leaves for some more moss.

1336.name: Leafy Path
1336.description: A cluster of mushrooms glows with an eerie red light, pulsing faintly.

npcs.name: Brigand
npcs.description: He looks pretty scraggly with his patched jerkin and week-old beard.

1337.name: Leafy Path
1337.description: Piles of leaves make passage here a noisy proposition. Branches and twigs strewn upon the ground add to the cacophony of forest noise. A large crow sits aloft the branch of an old oak to the side of the path. You are riding atop a well-bred horse.

npcs.name: Brigand
npcs.description: He looks pretty scraggly with his patched jerkin and week-old beard.

1338.name: Tusker Turn
1338.description: Cloven hoof marks have scored the ground here. Tusk marks are scored deep into the bark of the trees that make this turn. Deep ruts are in evidence everywhere.

npcs.name: Panath
npcs.description: Hugely muscled, and clad in naught but breeches, Panath - Slayer of Wild Beasts - and self proclaimed master huntsman, stalks the forest in search of his next prey.  Who knows, it could be you.

1339.name: Conifer Curve
1339.description: One large pine tree stands here with branches spread. The dense needles make the path veer to the west and stop travel to the north. The path continues to the south. You are riding atop a well-bred horse.

npcs.name: Deer
npcs.description: away at the first hint of danger.

1340.name: The Warren
1340.description: The most southern edge of the warren has the tell tale signs of marked territory. Rabbit droppings are scattered about in symbolic designs near the edges of the path.

1341.name: Forest Path
1341.description: A copse of trees almost obscure the small path that leads through the forest. A few birds chirp and dance among the leaves. *A graceful willow tree stands here, its trailing branches swaying gently.* You are riding atop a well-bred horse.

1342.name: Forest Path
1342.description: Many branches reach down and interlock in a graceful design. The interwoven leaves almost give the appearance of an arched ceiling. To the east, you see a small cabin. You are riding atop a well-bred horse.

1343.name: Forest Path
1343.description: The path winds north and south. However, travel to the other directions is cut off by the entangled limbs of the trees along the path. You are riding atop a well-bred horse.

1344.name: Forest Path
1344.description: The path extends among the trees to the north and to the south. A slight breeze wafts among the trees. A graceful willow tree stands here, its trailing branches swaying gently.

1345.name: Forest Path
1345.description: The trail leads only north and east. An enormous tree stands here blocking the way west. You are riding atop a well-bred horse.

1346.name: Forest Path
1346.description: A small tree leans out into the path trying to gather any sunlight or water it can. A nest is nestled in a bough near its trunk. You are riding atop a well-bred horse.

1347.name: Forest Path
1347.description: Great trees line the path that runs along the forest floor. Leaves are scattered on the forest floor and tiny creatures snack on the decaying matter. A small, almost hidden path leads south. You are riding atop a well-bred horse.

2760.name: Finwald Forester`s Cabin
2760.description: This is definitely the cabin of a forester. Axes of all sizes hang from the walls along with many different hunting implements. The head of a great stag deer is mounted above a meager fire place. The skull of a bear sits with mouth agape on the mantle.

npcs.name: Finwald the Forester
npcs.description: Hale and hearty, Finwald exemplifies all the things Sierra Club members would like to be.  All the way down to the axe with which to chop those

npcs.name: Nederic Nedaris
npcs.description: favor.  He looks around huffily for someone with whom to share his

npcs.name: Panath
npcs.description: Hugely muscled, and clad in naught but breeches, Panath - Slayer of Wild Beasts - and self proclaimed master huntsman, stalks the forest in search of his next prey.  Who knows, it could be you.

npcs.name: Vaelis Thirien
npcs.description: This haughty elf dressed in Evermore noble garb carries an air of confidence about him. He is determined to convey the will of King Eldraen with little sympathy for the challenges of his opponent's position.

1776.name: Forest Path
1776.description: There seems to be a break in the forest, and a small path runs to the east. The path also continues to the south and north amongst the trees. You are riding atop a well-bred horse.

npcs.name: Brigand
npcs.description: He looks pretty scraggly with his patched jerkin and week-old beard.

npcs.name: Deer
npcs.description: away at the first hint of danger.

npcs.name: Quest knight
npcs.description: a very courtly bearing, a pure heart, and is equipped like a noble.

1777.name: Forest Path
1777.description: The forest looks different here. The growth is extreme, and a presence exudes from the trees. The path runs east and west. The sound of water can be heard from deep within the woods. You have lost 32 experience.

1778.name: Forest Path
1778.description: The trees are dark and foreboding. Their bark is smooth and seem to have some indescribable quality.

1779.name: Forest Path
1779.description: There are no sounds here, only eerie silence. The trees seem to suck up all noise. The trees almost leer down at the path with disgust.

1780.name: Forest Path
1780.description: A terrible silence screams out to the forest. No animals make noise here, enormous knot at the base of a colossal tree.
